label: Download Link
description: Show a download button for a stored file in the graph. Wire any File value into `file`; the node renders the filename, size, and a Download button right in the editor. Clicking it runs the same authenticated handshake a CLI download uses and streams the bytes directly from storage. A terminal node: it emits nothing.

inputs.name: file
inputs.description: Stored file to offer for download (any type).
